title: tristania griffithii
intro: Tristania griffithii, also known as the red top, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Myrtaceae. The medicinal properties of Tristania griffithii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as tea, infusion, and tincture, which have been reported to have health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function.
